nasb.text: The wise in heart will be called understanding, And sweetness of speech increases persuasiveness.

esv.text: The wise of heart is called discerning, and sweetness of speech increases persuasiveness.

cnv.text: 心中有智慧的必稱為聰明人； 動聽的話能增加說服力。

ccb.text: 智者以明辨著称， 甜言能说服人心。

csbs.text: 心里有智慧的，被称为有悟性的人； 嘴唇的甘甜，使人增添学问。
